nasb.text: So I reprimanded the officials and said, “Why is the house of God forsaken?” Then I gathered them together and restored them to their posts.

esv.text: So I confronted the officials and said, “Why is the house of God forsaken?” And I gathered them together and set them in their stations.

cnv.text: 於是我責備眾官長說：“為甚麼疏忽供應　神的殿呢？”我就再召集利未人，使他們重站原來的崗位。

ccb.text: 我斥责众首领说：“为何忽略上帝的殿？”然后，我招聚利未人，叫他们各归各职。
